subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the divine fragrances and enkindled with the fire of God's love, I bear witness that thou hast hearkened unto the call and art stirred [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنجذب بنفحات الله و المشتعل بنار محبه الله اشهد انک لبیت الندآء و اهتز
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement, @visitation Tablets
